page_metadata.biotools__summary: PaSGAL (Parallel Sequence to Graph Aligner) is designed to accelerate local sequence alignment of sequences to directed acyclic sequence graphs (DAGs), e.g., variation graphs, splicing graphs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PaSGAL (Parallel Sequence to Graph Aligner) is designed to accelerate local sequence alignment of sequences to directed acyclic sequence graphs (DAGs), e.g., variation graphs, splicing graphs.
